title: Personal Assistant
description:
Job Description & Requirements

📌 Job Scope

You will provide comprehensive support in the following areas:

🧠 Work & Business Support

  • Assist in managing daily tasks, priorities, and follow-ups
  • Help organise thoughts and prepare materials for meetings or decision-making
  • Track and follow up on tasks assigned to internal teams to ensure progress
  • Support internal communication and coordination when required

📷 Content & Personal Brand Support

  • Assist in capturing and documenting daily content, ideas, or inspiration
  • Support simple photo/video recording and content workflow organisation
  • Coordinate external appointments, collaborations, or engagements

🧩 Personal & Lifestyle Support

  • Manage schedules, appointments, and calendar planning
  • Organise important documents and records
  • Assist with ad-hoc errands or procurement when required (non-routine)


✅ Additional Requirements

  • Strong familiarity with current social media platforms, content trends, and digital tools.
  • Able to support flexible and irregular working hours, including occasional evenings or weekends, when required.
  • Comfortable working closely in a one-to-one support role with the company’s founder.
  • Proficiency in English is required for internal communication and documentation. Proficiency in Mandarin is required to support daily communication with the founder and Mandarin-speaking stakeholders.
  • Able to work with flexible hours (not strictly 9–6)
  • 1–2 years of experience in a personal assistant, executive assistant, or similar coordination role.
  • A valid driving licence is preferred due to occasional errands and coordination duties.

postedCompany.description:
Though we are a newly established company, our team brings over 10 years of experience in the interior design sector, ensuring expertise and creativity in every project we undertake.


At Joy & Life ID Studio, we believe that every space tells a story, and we’re here to make joyful and full of life! 


As a young and dynamic interior design firm, our passion is creating spaces that spark happiness, inspire creativity, and bring comfort to everyday living. Our vibrant team thrives on fresh ideas, collaboration, and a positive work culture that values innovation and fun.


Our vision, “We design a space for customers’ joyful moment and life,” is at the heart of everything we do. Whether it’s a cozy home or a modern showroom, we strive to craft environments that not only look amazing but also enhance the moments that matter most to customer.


Welcome to join us! It will be unexpected spark between you and us!
postedCompany.name: JOY & LIFE INTERIOR DESIGN STUDIO PTE. LTD.
